MaterializedViewTask.definedSQL: SELECT DaysSinceEpoch * 86400000 AS tsMs, Carrier, SUM(ArrDelay) AS sum_ArrDelay, COUNT(*) AS flight_count, MIN(ArrDelay) AS min_ArrDelay, MAX(ArrDelay) AS max_ArrDelay, DISTINCTCOUNTRAWHLL(FlightNum) AS raw_hll_FlightNum, DISTINCTCOUNTRAWHLLPLUS(FlightNum) AS raw_hllplus_FlightNum FROM airlineStats GROUP BY DaysSinceEpoch * 86400000, Carrier
